name: taskflow
description: TaskFlow — личный таск-менеджер (full-stack monorepo: client + server)

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:reset
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
